name: wittgenstein-monorepo
description: Wittgenstein — harness-first multimodal runtime: text LLMs, typed codecs, traceable artifacts.

scripts.launch:check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter @wittgenstein/codec-audio test && pnpm --filter @wittgenstein/codec-sensor test
scripts.publish:npm-cli: pnpm run release:npm-cli && npm publish packages/cli/npm-publish
scripts.demo:audio: pnpm --filter @wittgenstein/cli exec wittgenstein audio "Hackathon launch voiceover with rain ambience" --dry-run --ambient rain --out artifacts/demo/hackathon-launch.wav
scripts.demo:tts: pnpm --filter @wittgenstein/cli exec wittgenstein tts "Hackathon voiceover for the Wittgenstein launch" --dry-run --ambient city --out artifacts/demo/hackathon-tts.wav
scripts.demo:sensor: pnpm --filter @wittgenstein/cli exec wittgenstein sensor "synthetic ecg trace for loupe dashboard" --dry-run --out artifacts/demo/hackathon-sensor.json
